title: protium cuneifolium
intro: Protium cuneifolium is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae, commonly known as the 'Protium tree' or 'Venom Tree'. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of a toxic resin, which has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The resin has been reported to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to various health benefits, including wound healing and antimicrobial protection. In herbal preparations, the resin of Protium cuneifolium is often used in the form of tinctures or infusions, although its use should be cautious due to the toxicity of its resin.
